_note: The per-lot association (grouping a lot's ordered boundary courses, incl. its L#/C# frontage) is NOT yet automated on raster plats. These two lots were read off sheet 2 of 482.pdf by a human and each was validated by BOTH oracles: traverse closure to near-zero AND computed area == the printed lot area. This file is the regression golden the future association algorithm must reproduce from the raster faces + per-edge VLM labels that close_lots.py already emits.
plat: Area Thirty3 Estates Subdivision (SW1/4 Sec 33, T20N R105W, Sweetwater County, WY)
source: sheet 2 drawing; L#/C# values from the banked line/curve tables

lots.frontage: radial arc C12 (cul-de-sac; sides meet the arc at 90deg)
